'''masaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pocoson|pocoson]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pocoson|pocoson]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| masaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæsæhæth|mæsæhæth]] || [[word:mæsæhæj|mæsæhæj]] || [[word:mæsæhæsh|mæsæhæsh]] || [[word:mæsæhæ|mæsæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:masasahath|masasahath]] || [[word:masasahaj|masasahaj]] || [[word:masasahash|masasahash]] || [[word:masasaha|masasaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:masahath|masahath]] || [[word:masahaj|masahaj]] || [[word:masahash|masahash]] || [[word:masaha|masaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:masafhath|masafhath]] || [[word:masafhaj|masafhaj]] || [[word:masafhash|masafhash]] || [[word:masafhaf|masafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:masahatha|masahatha]] || [[word:masahaja|masahaja]] || [[word:masahasha|masahasha]] || [[word:masahaka|masahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:masahath|masahath]] || [[word:masahaj|masahaj]] || [[word:masahash|masahash]] || [[word:masaha|masaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:masahathal|masahathal]] || [[word:masahajal|masahajal]] || [[word:masahashal|masahashal]] || [[word:masahakal|masahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:masahathatha|masahathatha]] || [[word:masahajaja|masahajaja]] || [[word:masahashasha|masahashasha]] || [[word:masahaka|masahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:masahathan|masahathan]] || [[word:masahajan|masahajan]] || [[word:masahashan|masahashan]] || [[word:masahakan|masahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:masahathaoro|masahathaoro]] || [[word:masahajaoro|masahajaoro]] || [[word:masahashaoro|masahashaoro]] || [[word:masahakaoro|masahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
